rubric_content.text_property: The response assigns a resource type and methodology codes consistent with what the source actually is. It uses platform methodology codes (SYN-01, SYN-02, OBS-01, EVAL-01) and assigns no MVP methodology (empty list) when none genuinely applies, rather than force-fitting one of the four.

The editorial description and AI summary are accurate to the resource and contain no invented specifics — no fabricated sample sizes, findings, statistics, dates, authors, or publication venues that are not supported by the supplied metadata or title.
The plain-language description is genuinely free of unexplained jargon and is understandable to a non-specialist reader, while remaining faithful to the resource.

The response includes a quality_score on a 0-100 scale, the six canonical quality dimensions (relevance, accuracy, authority, currency, accessibility, practical_utility), and any editorial badges are drawn only from the canonical badge set.

The routing decision (auto_accept, review_needed, or auto_exclude) is consistent with the quality and confidence signals, and resources that are unverifiable, dead-linked, or outside the four MVP methodologies are routed to human review rather than auto-accepted.
